name: science-superpowers
description: 15 composable computational-science methodology skills for research agents: framing research questions, surveying prior work, designing + PRE-REGISTERING analysis, reproducible setup, executing, verifying-results-before-claiming, investigating anomalies, requesting red-team / receiving critical review, and reporting/archiving. 'Pre-registration over TDD.' A science-domain reimplementation of Superpowers, by K-Dense.
